info.title: Coupa API
info.description: RESTful API that provides robust access to read, edit, or integrate your data with the Coupa platform. The [JSON](/api_docs/5.json) and [YAML](/api_docs/5.yaml) are also available.  To test with OAuth2 OAuth2AccessCode, make sure to include https://r39.coupadev.com/oauth2-redirect.html in the client's Redirect URI list

put.summary: Updates a contract when it's completed or published.
put.description: Updates a contract when it's completed or published.

scopes.core.contracts_template.read: Allows contracts templates to be read
scopes.core.contracts_template.write: Allows contracts templates to be modified

scopes.core.contracts_template.read: Allows contracts templates to be read

active.description: A false value will inactivate the account making it no longer available to users.  A true value will make it active and available to users.

code.description: All segments concatenated with a hyphen ( - )

created-at.description: Automatically created by Coupa in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+HH:MMZ

name.description: This is the nickname for the account.  Users can view and search against this field through the user interface.

segment-1.description: Each segment represents the segment of the account code (e.g. code: 99-9023-100132, where segment-1 is 99, segment-2 is 9023, and segment-3 is 100132)

imported-from-taxonomy.description: A true value will tell that the commodity is imported from Coupa Taxonomy. A false value will tell that the value is created by a user or system

preferred.description: A Yes/No value will mark/unmark commodity as preferred. Set to Automate if you want the system to mark preferred. 'Automatic' option is available only if 'Automatic Guided Requests configuration' is enabled in company information

discount-cutoff-day.description: Document before this day are eligible for discount else they will fall into the next month

discount-due-day.description: This field is used to calculate the document's discount due date.

discount-due-month.description: This field is used to calculate the document's discount due date along with the discount due day.

net-cutoff-day.description: This helps to determine payment due date if the document should be counted against this month or next

net-due-day.description: This helps to determine the document's payment due date

net-due-month.description: This helps to determine the document's payment due date

type.description: Type can be either DaysAfterNetPaymentTerm or SpecificDayPaymentTerm

allow-change-requests.description: Allows suppliers to create change requests from CSP

allow-cn-no-backing-doc-from-connect.description: If yes, then the supplier can create Credit Notes without backing invoice.

allow-csp-access-without-two-factor.description: Allows supplier to access Customer's data from CSP without Two Factor

allow-inv-from-connect.description: If yes, then the supplier can create invoices against their POs or Contracts in CSP

allow-inv-no-backing-doc-from-connect.description: If yes, then the supplier can create invoices without a backing PO or Contract in CSP.

allow-inv-unbacked-lines-from-connect.description: If yes, then the supplier can create unbacked invoices without a backing PO or Contract in CSP.

allow-order-confirmation-item-substituti.description: Allow supplier to propose item substitute on Order Confirmations

buyer-hold.description: Hold all POs for buyer review

coupa-pay-financing-only.description: Only pay financed invoices via Coupa Pay

cxml-http-password.description: Password required to access the Supplier's online store

cxml-http-username.description: User name required to access the Supplier's online store

cxml-invoice-secret.description: Secret Key for cXML Invoicing Authentication

cxml-ssl-version.description: Specify the SSL version used for cXML communication with the supplier

cxml-url.description: URL where POs are sent if PO transmission is "cxml"

dd-settings.description: Dynamic Discounting Settings whitelisted for supplier

default-locale.description: Default Locale for sending emails to this supplier

disable-cert-verify.description: Specify whether to ignore SSL certificate mismatch errors

do-not-accelerate.description: Do not accelerate the payment terms

hold-invoices-for-ap-review.description: Prevent invoices from this supplier from being approved before AP reviews them.

one-time-supplier.description: Indicates whether the supplier is a One Time Supplier

payment-method.description: Default payment method, selectable from drop down

po-email.description: Email where POs are sent if PO transmission is "email"

scf-configs.description: Supply Chain Finance Configurations whitelisted for supplier

scope-three-emissions.description: Indicates whether the supplier tracks Scope Three Emissions

send-invoices-to-approvals.description: If yes, then invoices will all be sent thru approvals, regardless of total amount.

supplier-community-enablement.description: Indicates community enablement status for the supplier
